response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:22: Intro screen identified as '博衣こより生誕Live 2026'. 2. 00:22-04:51: Song identified as 'ぼうけんのしょがきえました!' (Bouken no Sho ga Kiemashita!) based on lyrics. 3. Original artist found to be wonderful★opportunity!. 4. Performer is Hakui Koyori. 5. Lyrics retrieved and confirmed. 6. Final JSON structure created.
response.global_summary: A gaming-themed live performance by VTuber Hakui Koyori, featuring a cover of the song 'Bouken no Sho ga Kiemashita!' (Adventure Log Deleted!), originally by wonderful★opportunity!. The video features game-inspired visual elements.

scenes.description: The video begins with a static screen displaying '博衣こより生誕Live 2026 ゲームソングLive!' (Hakui Koyori Birthday Live 2026 Gaming Song Live). No vocal music is playing.
Hakui Koyori performs 'Bouken no Sho ga Kiemashita!'. Visuals include game-like elements.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぼうけんのしょがきえました！(oh！ヒイイ)
てくてく歩いてマモノと遭遇
そこそこ強いオレに皆、so good
セカイでいちばんゆうしゃっぽいぜ yeah！yeah！
よゆう じゃんね？

ちょこまかうごくな このゲルやろう
わしとてまほうくらいつかえるわ！
ほれほれ火あぶりの刑じゃ（ぼう！ぼう！）
もえてるぜ

おしえて おうさま あなたはさ、将棋でいうところの王将で
どうしてパーティの一員になる必要があるんですか！
ごまかいことを気にしすぎ！

おお、かみさま 今、ボクにお告げをください ください くださいな
ついでにあの おバカさんの…アタマをよくして！！
セカイの平和を求め 我らは旅してる
でも、やりました ついに
ぼうけんのしょがきえました。(・ω＜)テヘ

おいおい なにしてんの なにやった？
へ？
なにやった？ どうしてくれんの…
ノープロブレム i'm king. 3, 2, 1,
ホリット ホリット ホリットじゃ！

なかなか どうして ぼくらの旅は
ひとすじなわではいかないようす
ある朝おきたら牢屋のなかに（ろう！や！）
なにがあった？！

どうやら敵につかまったようじゃ
なにかの罠にはめられたようじゃ
ここから出るのは至難のわざじゃ（じゃあ、じゃあ、）
どうするよ？

おしえて おうさま もしかして
ものすごくエンジョイしていますね？
この状況でワクワクできるのはマジ羨ましいかぎりです…
あたりまえだぜぃ
ハートの導火線に
火をつけてくぜぃ
king of rock！！

ありえない展開は まさに想像超える魔法だ
強大な悪にうちかてる、そんなチカラをいま！
13の魔法を全て 今、使いこなし
魔王のいるフロアへと、すすめ！！

おお、かみさま、今 ボクにちからをください ください くださいな
ゆうしゃじゃなくてもいいから…立ち向かう勇気を！！！
セカイの平和まであと少しというとこで
またまたやらかしたよ
ぼうけんのしょがきえました！

おぉ しんじられない
わしも
ぼくの
わしらの こころは
おれそう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Oh! Hii)
Walking along, encounter with a monster
I'm pretty strong, everyone, so good
I'm the strongest hero in the world, yeah! yeah!
It's a piece of cake, isn't it?

Don't move around so much, you slime bastard
Even I can use a little magic!
Here, here, it's the punishment of being roasted (Bou! Bou!)
It's burning

Tell me, King, you're the King in Shogi
Why do you need to be a member of the party!
You worry too much about little things!

Oh, God, please give me a revelation, give it to me, give it to me
And while you're at it... make that idiot's... head better!!
We're traveling seeking world peace
But, I did it, finally, the adventure log has been deleted. (Tehe)

Hey, hey, what are you doing? What did you do?
Huh? What did you do? Why did you do it...
No problem, I'm king. 3, 2, 1,
It's a forfeit, a forfeit, a forfeit!

Our journey doesn't go smoothly, somehow
One morning we woke up in a prison (Prison!)
What happened?!
It seems we were caught by the enemy
It seems we were trapped by some kind of trap
Getting out of here is a difficult task (Well, well,)
What shall we do?

Tell me, King, by any chance, are you enjoying this a lot?
To be excited in this situation, I truly envy you...
Of course, I'm going to light the fuse of the heart
King of Rock!!

An impossible turn of events is magic that exceeds imagination
To be able to defeat a powerful evil, that power now!
Use all thirteen magics now, and proceed to the floor where the Demon King is!!

Oh, God, please give me power, give it to me, give it to me
Even if I'm not a hero... give me the courage to confront it!!!
Just a little more until world peace, and I messed up again
The adventure log has been deleted!

Oh, I can't believe it
Me too
My
Our hearts are about to break

scenes.description: The video ends with a static outro screen.
